parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, data: null, error: 'Unauthorized' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, data: { message: 'I2V generation started', topic_id: $json.body.topic_id } }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: Array.isArray($json) && $json[0] ? $json[0].project_id : null, topic_id: $('Webhook Trigger').item.json.body.topic_id, stage: 'i2v', action: 'started', details: { pending_scenes: Array.isArray($json) ? $json.length : 0, model: 'fal-ai/wan-25-preview/image-to-video' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $json.project_id, topic_id: $json.topic_id, stage: 'i2v', action: $json.stopped ? 'stopped' : 'completed', details: { completed: $json.completed, failed: $json.failed, skipped_no_image: $json.skipped_no_image, total_cost: $json.total_cost } }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { message: 'I2V generation complete. Assembly claimed by another workflow or not yet ready.', ...$input.first().json } }];

// No scenes to process - go directly to completion sync
return [{ json: { topic_id: $input.first().json.topic_id, project_id: null, completed: 0, failed: 0, skipped_no_image: 0, total_cost: 0, stopped: false } }];
